extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET won Stage 12 after FROOM couldn't respond to ARU's attack in final 200m, ARU takes yellow by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Porte de Bales pace by Sky broke teammate FUGLSANG (with broken arm) but created vulnerability for Froom on final ramps.
LANDA looked stronger than Froom on Peyresourde, didn't appear to breathe hard while pacing, suggests Sky domestique reserve strength.
Peloton neutralized after Froom/Aru/Nieve crash into campers at sharp right turn before final climb, questioning yellow jersey etiquette.
Final 200m 20%+ ramps exposed Froom's weakness after Sky controlled entire stage, first time he's cracked since 2012.

rider_signals.FROOM Chris: negative: admitted no legs on final kick after Sky controlled pace all day, unprecedented weakness on 20%+ ramps
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: only attack Froom couldn't respond to since 2012, strong enough to take yellow despite losing Fuglsang
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: appeared stronger than Froom on Peyresourde, barely breathing while pacing, suggests untapped capacity
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: dropped on Porte de Bales despite racing with two broken bones in left arm, compromised Aru's team support
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nacho: negative: dropped decisively, now 4:01 behind after refusing to attack when Sky crashed, appears out of contention
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: extended KOM lead to 40 points with selective point-hunting while being distanced on final climbs
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: showed brief life on Porte de Bales but paid dearly later, confirms decline
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: reckless descent into camper crash created unnecessary risk with no tactical upside
